channel.title: Monitoring on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Monitoring on Bill's Blog

item.title: Building a Prometheus and Grafana Observability Stack for My Home Lab
item.description: The dashboard layer under the LaMetric glance: Prometheus scraping my Debian VM and pfSense firewall, Grafana turning it into real graphs with history — all on one isolated VM, bound to localhost, reusing the SNMP work from the last project.
